rationale: The imminent US-Iran deal is the most impactful new development for Romania, offering potential energy price relief; Ukraine's continued strikes on Russian energy are a continuation of the background war dynamic.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal scheduled to be signed Sunday
top_events.summary: A finalized Iran deal could ease European energy prices, benefiting Romanian households and industry still exposed to elevated energy costs.

top_events.title: Ukraine to keep targeting Russian energy infrastructure
top_events.summary: Ukraine's strikes on Russian energy terminals continue near Romania's regional sphere; no direct escalation toward Romania but adds to Black Sea tension background.

top_events.title: Albania protests escalate over Kushner-backed coastal development
top_events.summary: Escalating protests in neighboring Albania over a controversial development project are a minor regional signal but have no direct impact on Romanian daily life.
